verses.1: So they brought the ark of God and placed it inside the tent that David had pitched for it. And they presented burnt offerings and peace offerings before God.
verses.2: When David had finished sacrificing the burnt offerings and peace offerings, he blessed the people in the name of the LORD.
verses.3: Then he distributed to every man and woman of Israel a loaf of bread, a date cake, and a raisin cake.
verses.4: David appointed some of the Levites to minister before the ark of the LORD, to celebrate, to give thanks, and to praise the LORD, the God of Israel.
verses.5: Asaph was the chief, Zechariah was second, then Jeiel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Mattithiah, Eliab, Benaiah, Obed-edom, and Jeiel. They were to play the harps and lyres, while Asaph sounded the cymbals
verses.6: and the priests Benaiah and Jahaziel blew the trumpets regularly before the ark of the covenant of God.
verses.7: On that day David first committed to Asaph and his associates this song of thanksgiving to the LORD:
verses.36: Then all the people said, “Amen!” and “Praise the LORD!”
verses.37: So David left Asaph and his associates there before the ark of the covenant of the LORD, to minister there regularly according to the daily requirements,
verses.38: along with Obed-edom and his sixty-eight relatives. Obed-edom son of Jeduthun, and also Hosah, were to be gatekeepers.
verses.39: And David left Zadok the priest and his fellow priests before the tabernacle of the LORD at the high place in Gibeon
verses.40: to regularly present burnt offerings to the LORD on the altar of burnt offerings, morning and evening, according to all that was written in the Law of the LORD, which He had commanded Israel to keep.
verses.41: With them were Heman, Jeduthun, and the rest of those chosen and designated by name to give thanks to the LORD, for “His loving devotion endures forever.”
verses.42: Heman and Jeduthun had with them trumpets and cymbals for the music and instruments for the songs of God. And the sons of Jeduthun were stationed at the gate.
verses.43: Then all the people departed for their homes, and David returned home to bless his household.
